description: Original tasks before rewriting based on actual data

tasks.name: Book a 2-hour home office decluttering session on a specific date under $200
tasks.description: Schedule a 2-hour Home Office Decluttering session on Wednesday, September 18, between 2:00–5:00 pm and select the cheapest available time slot under $200, then confirm the booking.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the primary “Book Now” button in the main banner on the homepage.
On the service selection page, click the service tile labeled “Home Office Decluttering.”
In the duration section, select the option labeled “2-hour session.”
Open the date picker and select the calendar date Wednesday, September 18.
In the time window filter, choose or set the range “2:00 pm – 5:00 pm” so only afternoon slots appear.
Open the sorting dropdown for available time slots and select the option “Price: Low to High.”
From the sorted list, click the first time slot shown that has a total price displayed as less than $200.

On the booking details form, enter the name field as “Alex Rivera,” email as “alex.rivera@example.com,” phone as “555-123-7890,” select the payment option “Pay at appointment,” and click the “Confirm Booking” button.

tasks.name: Customize a whole-home organizing package with 3 bedrooms and limited-cost add-ons
tasks.description: Select a Whole Home package for 3 bedrooms, add exactly two add-on services each under $50 with a combined add-on cost under $80, and add the customized package to the cart.
steps: From the homepage, click on the top navigation link labeled “Packages.”
On the Packages page, use the category filter to select “Whole Home” packages.
Click on the package card titled “Whole Home Refresh” to open its details page.
In the room configuration section, set the number of bedrooms to “3” using the dropdown or plus/minus control.
Scroll to the “Add-On Services” section and apply the price filter so that only add-ons priced under $50 are shown.
From the filtered add-ons, select one service (e.g., “Donation Drop-Off”) under $50, then select a second different service under $50 so that their combined displayed prices total less than $80.
Review the summary sidebar or configuration panel to ensure it lists “3 bedrooms” and exactly two selected add-ons, then click the button labeled “Update Package” or “Save Customization.”
Click the “Add Package to Cart” button to add the customized Whole Home Refresh package with the selected add-ons to the shopping cart.

tasks.name: Buy 4 clear storage bins with rating ≥4, capacity ≥20L, price $15–$30, and free shipping
tasks.description: Find closet storage bins that are clear, cost between $15–$30 each, have at least 4 stars, capacity of at least 20 liters, and free shipping, then add quantity 4 of the chosen item to the cart.
steps: Click the “Shop Products” or “Store” link in the top navigation from any page.
On the product categories list, click the category labeled “Closet & Wardrobe Storage.”
In the filters sidebar, open the “Price” filter and set the minimum price to 15 and the maximum price to 30, then apply the filter.
Open the “Customer Rating” filter and select only products with ratings of “4 stars & up.”
Open the “Capacity” or “Size” filter and choose options that include “20L or larger” (or the closest equivalent range), then apply.
In the “Color/Material” or “Style” filter, select the variant labeled “Clear.”
In the shipping filter section, check the option for “Free Shipping” so only items with free shipping are shown.
From the filtered product list, click the first product card that meets all of these criteria to open its product detail page.
On the product detail page, set the quantity field to “4” using the quantity selector, and then click the “Add to Cart” button.

tasks.name: Purchase the cheapest 3-session virtual coaching bundle with 60-minute sessions and apply a promo code
tasks.description: Find virtual decluttering coaching bundles, filter to 3-session bundles with 60-minute sessions, select the cheapest one, and apply the promo code TIDY10 at checkout before proceeding to the payment step.
steps: From the homepage, open the main menu and click on “Virtual Services.”
On the Virtual Services page, select the category labeled “Virtual Decluttering Coaching.”
In the filter panel, open the “Number of Sessions” filter and select the option “3 sessions.”
Open the “Session Length” filter and select “60-minute sessions.”
Use the sorting dropdown to choose “Price: Low to High” so that the least expensive bundles are listed first.
Click on the first bundle in the sorted results list to open its details page.
On the bundle details page, click the “Add Bundle to Cart” or equivalent button.
Navigate to the cart page using the cart icon in the header and then click the “Proceed to Checkout” button.

On the checkout page, locate the promo code field, type “TIDY10” into it, click the “Apply” button, fill in the name as “Jordan Kim” and email as “jordan.kim@example.com” in the contact fields, and then click “Continue to Payment” to reach the payment step.

tasks.name: Submit an in-home assessment request for a 2-bedroom, 900 sq ft apartment with budget note
tasks.description: Fill out the in-home assessment request form for a 2-bedroom, 900 sq ft apartment, with a preferred Wednesday evening time and a note that the budget is under $400, then submit the request.
steps: From the homepage, click on the “In-Home Assessment” link in the navigation or main banner.
On the assessment information page, click the button labeled “Request Assessment” to open the inquiry form.
In the form’s name field, type “Taylor Morgan,” and in the email field, type “taylor.morgan@example.com.”
In the address or city field, type “Downtown District” (or similar placeholder), and in the phone field, enter “555-222-3344.”
In the home details section of the form, select “Apartment” as the home type, set the number of bedrooms to “2,” and type “900” into the square footage field.
In the date preference dropdown or field, choose “Wednesday” as the preferred day and select a time preference option labeled “Evening (5–8 pm).”
In the text area labeled “Additional Details” or “Notes,” type: “Looking for an initial assessment for a 2-bedroom, 900 sq ft apartment. My budget for the first project is under $400.”
Scroll to the bottom of the form and click the “Submit Request” button to send the in-home assessment inquiry.

tasks.name: Save a recent small-kitchen organization article and add a free checklist to cart
tasks.description: Locate a kitchen organization article tagged for small kitchens that was published within the last 6 months, save it to a reading list, then from its related resources add a free printable checklist to the cart.
steps: Click on the “Resources” or “Blog” link in the top navigation.
On the blog page, use the category or tag filter to select “Kitchen Organization” and then further filter by “Small Kitchens,” if available.
Use the sort or date filter to show articles from the “Last 6 Months” or to sort by “Newest First.”
From the filtered articles, click on the first article that indicates it is about organizing small kitchens to open its full content page.
On the article page, click the “Save to Reading List,” “Bookmark,” or similar button associated with the article.
Scroll to the section labeled “Related Resources” or “Downloads” and locate a checklist labeled “Kitchen Decluttering Checklist” or similar that is marked with a price of $0 or “Free.”
Click on the title or “View Details” link for the free checklist to open its detail page.
On the checklist detail page, click the “Add to Cart” button to add the free printable checklist to the shopping cart.

tasks.name: Purchase a $150 physical gift card with neutral design and standard shipping under $8
tasks.description: Buy a $150 physical gift card for a birthday, choosing a neutral design and selecting a standard shipping option that costs less than $8, then proceed to the checkout stage.
steps: From any page, click on the top navigation link labeled “Gift Cards.”
On the Gift Cards page, select the option for “Physical Gift Card” rather than digital or e-gift.
In the amount selection area, choose or enter a custom amount of “150” dollars for the gift card value.
Browse the available card designs and click on a design labeled “Neutral,” “Minimal,” or similar non-seasonal style.
In the occasion dropdown, select “Birthday” as the occasion type.
Fill in the recipient name field with “Sam Lee” and the sender name field with “Pat Jordan.”
Click the “Add to Cart” or “Continue” button to move to the shipping selection page or cart.
On the shipping options section, select a “Standard Shipping” method that shows a price under $8 and then click “Proceed to Checkout” to continue toward payment.

tasks.name: Select a closet organization package with ≥10 hours under $600 and Saturday morning availability
tasks.description: Compare closet organization packages, choose the one that offers at least 10 total service hours, costs under $600, and has the highest rating among those options, then begin booking it for a Saturday between 9:00 am and 1:00 pm next month.
steps: From the homepage, click on the “Services” link in the main navigation.
On the Services page, select the category labeled “Closet & Wardrobe Organization.”
In the package list, use the filter panel to set “Total Hours” to show options with 10 or more hours.
Set the price filter so that the maximum price is 600, and apply the filter to limit packages to those under $600.
Use the sort dropdown to sort the filtered packages by “Customer Rating: High to Low.”
From the sorted list, click the first package card shown (the highest-rated option that meets the hours and price criteria) to open its details page.
On the package details page, click the “Book This Package” button to start the booking process.

In the booking calendar, navigate to the next calendar month and select a Saturday date, then in the time slot list choose a start time between 9:00 am and 1:00 pm, and click the “Continue” or “Next” button to reach the booking review step.
